pageContext.name: Ramona Flowers
pageContext.description: Scott Pilgrim and Ramona Flowers jump out of the pages of Bryan Lee O'Malley's graphic novel and onto your shelf with new 6 collectible figures from ISH!  Designed by creator/artist Bryan Lee O'Malley himself, these 6' collectible figures feature points of articulation at the head, wrists, shoulders, elbows, and waist and include iconic accessories like Ramona's Subspace Suitcase, baseball bat and! Each figure comes in collectible packaging with ALL-NEW ART by Bryan Lee O'Malley.
